contexts.context: ...an hour from the outskirts of Vienna an invisible <mark>thread</mark> bisectxs the motorway.  It leads from the church...
...other, through a wicket gate, and now the <mark>thread</mark>, which has turned neither to right nor left...
...other side was renamed Auden-AStrasse.  This <mark>thread</mark> or unseen line joins the places where Auden prayed...
